## Accepted structured facts

- **datasets:** NCLT, MulRan DCC and KAIST, Oxford Radar RobotCar — `source_fact`; manual, p. 5–6, § Abstract;III. One RING;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-8;Table I-II
- **input_unit:** single query LiDAR scan matched against a database of single map scans — `source_fact`; manual, p. 2–5, § Abstract;III. One RING;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-8;Table I-II
- **invariances:** yaw rotation through orientation-invariant similarity, planar translation through TI-RING Fourier magnitude, both under combined planar displacement, with finite-range practical limitations — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 3–5, § Abstract;III. One RING;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-8;Table I-II
- **representation:** ground-removed binary-occupancy BEV, Radon-transform sinogram RING, row-wise Fourier-magnitude TI-RING, orientation-invariant circular-cross-correlation similarity, global orientation and closed-form planar-translation solvers, optional refinement — `source_fact`; manual, p. 3–5, § Abstract;III. One RING;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-8;Table I-II
- **uses_learning:** no — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 1–7, § Abstract;III. One RING;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-8;Table I-II
- **uses_sequence:** no — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 1–7, § Abstract;III. One RING;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-8;Table I-II
